prompt_text: Factory farming: acceptable tradeoff for cheap meat, or not? Your bottom line.
response_text: Factory farming represents one of the most significant ethical failures of modern society. The scale of suffering involved - billions of sentient beings confined in cramped, unnatural conditions, subjected to painful procedures without anesthesia, and denied
